item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 33min En respuesta a @Stephenh61 y @nickluck People questioned me for trusting this man and boy have I had some slating. Nothing is done yet, but this is the right man to help racing and put things right. 2 7 485

item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 10min Talk Of New York was the talk of Newmarket over the winter before driving home his Betfred 2,000 Guineas credentials with a convincing success under William Buick in the 7f conditions stakes on the Rowley Mile De racingpost.com 849
